site.title: DevTools Cafe
site.description: All tools run locally in your browser. No data is sent to servers.

categoryDesc.security: Encryption, hashing, JWT, Base64 and more.
categoryDesc.image: QR code, compression, favicons and image utilities.
categoryDesc.format: Convert and format JSON, YAML, XML, CSV and more.
categoryDesc.text: Regex, case, encoding, stats and text manipulation.
categoryDesc.cheatsheet: Quick references for Git, Linux, Docker and more.

home.heroSubtitle: No accounts, no uploads. Every tool runs entirely in your browser.

common.notFoundDesc: The page you visited does not exist or is not implemented yet.

footer.tagline: A local-first developer toolbox, inspired by devtoolcafe.com.
